title: The Straw Hats Reach Egghead
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Vegapunk, Pythagoras, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Dorry as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since we're on the subject, what happened to your ship and crew?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I came alone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that metal monster back there gobled up my ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That reminds me, I'm starving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: LET'S GO FIND A RESTAU- RANT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm hungry too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh, do you have any money on you, Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You boneheads don't have a clue, do you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're Not gonna find any food joints here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS IS A GOVERNMENT ISLAND!! DO I HAVE TO SPELL EVERYTHING OUT?!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: We're on Egghead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The island that's said to be 500 years in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Pythagoras
dialogue.text: Dr. Vegas research lab is based here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Vegapunk?! I know that name!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vegapunk's the reason I'm here. We've got business.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A 61-GIA-

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Giant Robot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Gah... this won't do at all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's another failure. Hmm, I wonder why though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Perhaps overriding primal desires is simply impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Some- body's coming out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thanks for saving us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How utterly vexing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...who- ever you are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I ordered the Mecha- Shark...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to scout, report, and fire. But if it keeps trying to eat ships,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There won't be anything left to salvage. I must have bungled the programming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me, but did you just say I saved you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, you naive pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I work for the government! Despite my mediocrity,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They like to call me their scientific genius.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You can call me...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Dr. Vegasupunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
